ModMetaData.name: Gerrymon's RJW Retexture
ModMetaData.author: Gerrymon
ModMetaData.description: A collection of vanilla-fied textures of RJW and a few of its submods. Mainly the BDSM focused ones. Quick summary: -- Basic RJW: New textures for items and prisoner chain -- RJW Extension: New textures for bondage gears and fuck machines -- S16's Extension: New textures for most bondage gears, piercings, and vibrators -- Human Cattle: New textures for items and cow bell. Human milk texture also works for equal milking. -- Peculiar Institution: Compatibility with Stylized Slave Collars -- Petification: Complete retexture and making the gears more medieval-friendly -- Dynamics: New textures for the apparels
